title: Actor, outbox, and followers endpoints
description: GET /users/{username} — serve actor JSON-LD document (id, type:Person, preferredUsername, name, summary, inbox, outbox, followers, publicKey). GET /users/{username}/outbox — paginated OrderedCollection of Create{Note} activities (public posts, newest first). GET /users/{username}/followers — OrderedCollection with totalItems count only, no items enumeration (privacy). Content-Type: application/activity+json for all.
close_reason: Post creation, WebFinger/NodeInfo, actor/outbox/followers endpoints all implemented and smoke-tested
